children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The penalties provided for in subsections (b) and (c) of shall apply to a person that violates, attempts to violate, conspires to violate, or causes a violation of a provision specified in paragraph (2) of this subsection, or an order or regulation prescribed under such a provision, to the same extent that such penalties apply to a person that commits an unlawful act described in .section 1705 of title 50section 1705(a) of title 50

children.label: A
children.text: Sections 8721, 8722, 8723, and 8726 of this title, subchapter III, and subchapter VII.

children.label: B
children.text: Sections 8514a and 8514b of this title, as added by subtitle A of title IV.
